title: Bridge Essay: Pattern breaking: a complex systems approach to psychedelic medicine.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Pattern breaking: acomplex systems approach to psychedelic medicine.**. Neurosci Conscious.. PMID: 37424966. DOI: 10.1093/nc/niad017. Recent research has demonstrated the potential of psychedelic therapy for mental health care. However, the psychological experience underlying its therapeutic effects remains poorly understood. This paper proposes aframework that suggests psychedelics act as destabilizers, both psychologically and neurophysiologically.
